title: teline microphylla
intro: Teline microphylla, also known as white broom or Spanish broom, is a flowering legume native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Teline microphylla are said to include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antiseptic. Teline microphylla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and calmness.
